zh.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry是SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark和Elene Quarantley的兒子，於大約1290年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾德盧姆利。他於1338年與Christian Callendar在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年12月1日之前在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾可萊德班可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry是SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark和Elene Quarantley的儿子，于大约1290年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾德盧姆利。他于1338年与Christian Callendar在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年12月1日之前在苏格兰斯林史爾卡倫達爾 帕克，埋葬在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾可萊德班可。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry was born about 1290, in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland as the son of SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark and Elene Quarantley. He married Christian Callendar in 1338, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1 December 1364, in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, and was buried in Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry est né environ 1290, à Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, fils de SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark et Elene Quarantley. Il a épousé Christian Callendar en 1338, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1 décembre 1364, à Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry wurde um 1290 in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, als Sohn von SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark und Elene Quarantley geboren. Er hat 1338 in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Christian Callendar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1. Dezember 1364 in Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry è nato il circa 1290 nel Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland come figlio di SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark e Elene Quarantley. Lui sposato Christian Callendar nel 1338, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1 dicembre 1364, nel Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumryは約1290年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアドルムリーでSirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of LanarkとElene Quarantleyの息子として生まれた。1338年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングでChristian Callendarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年12月1日以前にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカレンダー パークで死去し，イギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアクリデバンクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry(은)는 대략 1290년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드럼리에서 SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark(와)과 Elene Quarantley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1338년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 Christian Callendar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 12월 1일 이전 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘렌더르 박에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 클리데반크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland filho de SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark e Elene Quarantley. Ele casou-se com Christian Callendar em 1338, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1 de dezembro de 1364, em Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry родился около 1290 г. в местности друмри, дунбартоншир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark и Elene Quarantley. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Callendar в 1338 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1 декабрь 1364 г. в местности каллендар парк, стирлингшир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности клидебанк, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1290–Bef 1 December 1364: e tusa o le 1290–a'e le'I oo le 1 Tesema 1364

es.lifeSummary: William Livingston Laird of Drumry nació aproximadamente 1290, en Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland como hijo de SirSheriff Andrew de Livingston of Lanark y Elene Quarantley. Se casó con Christian Callendar en 1338, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1 de diciembre de 1364, en Callendar Park, Stirlingshire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Clydebank, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
